title: Surely I am not the first
display_title: Surely I am not the first
wikitext:
[]: Surely I am not the first....             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Sun Jan 25, 2026 12:04 am Let me start by saying I am not a Shinji-hater. Some people are though, and when a person called him cringe I had to suggest a new nickname. CRINJI tell me I am not the first to suggest it....

[]: Re: Surely I am not the first....             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Jan 27, 2026 10:54 am Don't think I've ever seen that one before, but it's pretty funny.

[]: Re: Surely I am not the first....             Quote Post by dzzthink » Sun Feb 01, 2026 1:03 pm This animation did it before https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=wdcmJeBPj ... ltYXRpb24g

[]: Re: Surely I am not the first....             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Sun Feb 01, 2026 1:53 pm It does. It does indeed. LOL This parody missed out on a lot of potential but they did beat me to it. nice find
